Do not include a QA note when no issue is observed.

# QA Testing Plan - Pawfect Match

- [ ] Test 'Max distance' filter functionality
- [ ] Test 'Dog size' filter functionality
- [ ] Test 'Energy vibe' filter functionality
- [ ] Test 'Pass' and 'Send Paw' interactions

transitions.observation: memory: Initialized QA testing plan. Will investigate 'Max distance' filter, 'Dog size' filter, 'Energy vibe' filter, and card interactions. | next_goal: Initialize todo.md file to track QA testing tasks.

memory: Starting QA testing of 'Max distance' filter. Current card shows '2 mi'. Will set filter to 'Within 3 miles'. | next_goal: Select 'Within 3 miles' from the 'Max distance' dropdown and verify if the card updates or remains.

memory: Testing 'Max distance' filter. Currently set to 'Within 3 miles' with card '2 mi'. Will test 'Within 8 miles' next to see if the card remains consistent or updates. | next_goal: Change 'Max distance' filter to 'Within 8 miles' and observe the card.

memory: Testing 'Dog size' filter. Currently set to 'Any size'. Will change to 'Large' and check if the card updates. | next_goal: Select 'Large' from the 'Dog size' dropdown and observe if the card updates.

transitions.qa_observation: The 'Max distance' filter is set to 'Within 8 miles', but the displayed card shows '11 mi', which is outside the selected range. This indicates a potential bug in the filtering logic. Now testing 'Energy vibe' filter by selecting 'Calm'.
transitions.observation: next_goal: Select 'Calm' from the 'Energy vibe' dropdown and observe if the card updates to reflect the new filter.

done.text:
QA testing completed for 'Pawfect Match'. 

Findings:
- 'Dog size' filter: Functional.
- 'Energy vibe' filter: Functional.
- 'Max distance' filter: Appears broken/ignored. Even when set to specific ranges, the results do not consistently respect the distance constraint (e.g., showing pups outside the selected range).
- 'Pass' button: Functional.
- 'Send Paw' button: Functional.
- 'No more pups' state: Correctly displayed when no more profiles are available.

All planned tests have been executed.

transitions.observation: memory: Completed all planned QA tests. Confirmed 'Dog size', 'Energy vibe', 'Pass', and 'Send Paw' work. Identified that 'Max distance' filter is likely broken (ignored). | next_goal: Call done to finalize the QA report.
